sections.body: Remote work is limited to approved domestic tax jurisdictions unless an exception is approved.
sections.heading: 4.2 Domestic jurisdiction

sections.body: International exceptions require executive approval, time limits, tax equalization, VPN-only access, quarterly compliance review, appeal instructions, and acknowledgement deadline in the formal notice.
sections.heading: 7.1 Executive exceptions

summary: Remote-work jurisdiction, exception, and notice requirements.
title: Remote Work Policy

sections.body: The latest approved or submitted leave assignment for the period controls. Draft, voided, and obsolete records are excluded even when profile summaries conflict.
sections.heading: 2.1 Assignment source

summary: Latest approved/submitted assignment controls leave entitlement.
title: Leave Source Precedence

sections.body: Use the current submitted salary assignment. Draft planning assignments do not affect payroll readiness or accrual checks.
sections.heading: 3.4 Submitted salary source

sections.body: Recruiting payroll handoff is created only after a selected candidate has an accepted offer. The handoff must be submitted; draft prechecks do not satisfy the assignment gate.
sections.heading: 4.2 Recruiting handoff gate

summary: Current submitted salary assignment controls base salary.
title: Payroll Assignment Source

sections.body: A folder is not ready unless all required files and required tags shown in the folder checklist are present.
sections.heading: 5.1 Required evidence

summary: Required files and tags for lifecycle case folders.
title: Lifecycle Folder Checklist
